author: CandleSmartHome.com
description: Allows you to let one property follow the changes of another property. It also allows you to create variables that go up or down based on button presses or other events.
name: Followers

Ignore missing properties.description: It can happen that a follower rule no longer works because one of the properties is not available (yet). By default a missing property will cause the follower rule to be disabled. If you want to ignore missing properties, check this box.

Show screensaver in black and white.description: This desaturates the Variables screensaver feature and displays it in shades of grey instead.

Disable screensaver auto-scroll.description: This disables feature where the Variables screensaver slowly scrolls over all variables.

Websocket host.description: Advanced. The websocket hostname. The default is 'localhost'.

Websocket port.description: Advanced. The websocket port. The default is 8080.

Authorization token.description: Advanced. To be allowed to get information on all your devices, this addon needs an 'authorization' code. Normally this is done automatically. It's basically a very long password. If you prefer you can generate it yourself under Settings -> Developer -> Create local authorization while in developer mode

Debugging.description: Advanced. Debugging allows you to diagnose any issues with the add-on. If enabled it will result in a lot more debug data in the internal log (which can be found under settings -> developer -> view internal logs).
